meaning: 塔纳湖 [埃塞俄比亚西北部]
examples: Elephants were often to be found in swamp in eastern Kenya around the Tana River.
A Hollywood restaurateur named Dan Tana is also on board with the project.
While in Manhattan, I saw a TV commercial featuring our very own Tana (the runner-up from Season three).
From Khartoum, it is a bumpy drive into Ethiopia, where you can trace the Blue Nile to Lake Tana.
In recent months, retaliatory attacks between rival tribes have raged in Tana River District, leaving more than 100 people dead.
